name: Hop Splash Variety Pack
description: Shipping to all lower 48 states. Treat your tastebuds to a splash of bubbly refreshment, crafted with the perfect pairing of real fruit juice and vibrant hops for a welcome flavor escape - anytime, anywhere. This zero-alcohol alternative delivers our signature Sierra Nevada hop flavor with every sip. Includes three varieties: Grapefruit & Blood Orange, Lemon & Lime, Peach & Passion Fruit Price is inclusive of CA CRV. Hop Splash and Trail Pass orders are fulfilled within 2-3 business days. Please note that if you are located in an area experiencing winter weather or freezing conditions, we may hold your shipment to ensure it is not damaged during delivery.

name: Trail Pass Hazy IPA
description: Shipping to all lower 48 states except GA, ID, MI, MS, TN, and WV. Grab a Trail Pass and start a new adventure with miles of flavor. Explore this non-alcoholic Hazy IPA, bursting with Mosaic and El Dorado hops. It’s a juicy flavorscape fit for any adventure. “It meets all of our criteria for what we would consider a craft IPA—not necessarily even a craft non-alcoholic IPA, but a craft IPA,” says James Conery, Innovation Brewmaster at Sierra Nevada. Trail Pass uses traditional brewing methods, not alcohol removal, to create full craft flavor below the 0.5% ABV non-alcoholic threshold. ABV: 0.0-0.5% IBUs: 40 Calories: 71 per 12oz can Carbs: 14.6g per 12oz can Price is inclusive of CA CRV. Hop Splash and Trail Pass orders are fulfilled within 2-3 business days. Please note that if you are located in an area experiencing winter weather or freezing conditions, we may hold your shipment to ensure it is not damaged during delivery. WARNING: Drinking distilled spirits, beer, coolers, wine and other alcoholic beverages may increase cancer risk, and during pregnancy, can cause birth defects. For more information go to Alcoholic Beverages - Proposition 65 Warnings Website (ca.gov)

Hop Splash has zero alcohol, zero calories, and maximum hop refreshment. Check out the Hop Splash tasting video. Price is inclusive of CA CRV. Hop Splash and Trail Pass orders are fulfilled within 2-3 business days. Please note that if you are located in an area experiencing winter weather or freezing conditions, we may hold your shipment to ensure it is not damaged during delivery.

name: Trail Pass Variety Pack
description: SHIPPING TO ALL LOWER 48 STATES EXCEPT GA, ID, MI, MS, TN, AND WV. Grab a 12-Pack Trail Pass Variety Pack and start a non-stop adventure. With new brews like our Juicy IPA, Hazy IPA, and crushable Brewveza alongside our classic Golden, you’re packed for miles of flavor whichever path you choose. Trail Pass uses traditional brewing methods, not alcohol removal, to create full craft flavor below the 0.5% ABV non-alcoholic threshold. Trail Pass Brewveza: Refreshing flavor and a crisp finish, perfectly crushable for the beach, the bike trail, or the backyard. Trail Pass Hazy IPA: Bursting with Mosaic and El Dorado hops. It’s a juicy flavorscape fit for any adventure. Trail Pass Golden: Packed with fruity aromas, bright floral notes, and smooth malt. Trail Pass Juicy IPA PRICE IS INCLUSIVE OF CA CRV. Hop Splash and Trail Pass orders are fulfilled within 2-3 business days. name: Hop Splash Grapefruit & Blood Orange Sparkling Hop Water
description: Shipping to all lower 48 states. Take the fruity notes of Mosaic® and Simcoe hops, add a perfect splash of real blood orange and grapefruit juice, and you’ve got a match for maximum flavor. Reach for Hop Splash Citrus, your all-day hop refreshment. Carbon-Filtered Water: Hop Splash starts with the same water we use for brewing beer. It’s carbon-filtered to ensure the highest-quality H₂O out of the gate. Real Hops, Real Juice: We pair up real Mosaic® and Simcoe hops with real blood orange and grapefruit juice for an all-day, IPA-inspired flavor party. Sustainable CO2: We capture, clean, and reuse carbon dioxide from beer fermentation to carbonate Hop Splash, keeping CO2 out of the atmosphere and closing the loop. Check out the Hop Splash tasting video here. Price is inclusive of CA CRV. Hop Splash and Trail Pass orders are fulfilled within 2-3 business days. Please note that if you are located in an area experiencing winter weather or freezing conditions, we may hold your shipment to ensure it is not damaged during delivery.
